title: Miliband’s net zero policies fail to reduce reliance on fossil fuel
description: Ed Miliband’s net zero policies are failing to reduce Britain’s reliance on fossil fuels, the Government has admitted.

title: Ancient royal fort in Shahgarh reduces to ruins
description: MUZAFFAR GARH - In the suburban area of Shahgarh, an ancient royal fort, once of significant strategic and defensive importance has now deteriorated into ruins due to prolonged neglect and environmental impact.

title: Carp battles rushing stream in scene echoing ancient legend
description: In Hangzhou, China, on March 16, 2026, a carp was filmed fighting strong currents in a park stream, reflecting the legendary tale of perseverance.

title: Musanze launches Rwf100bn plan to develop ancient coronation site for tourism
description: Musanze District has unveiled a $75 million plan (approx. Rwf109.2 billion) to develop the Rwanda's ancient coronation site into a cultural tourism destination. The sit...
